response.justification: Candidate has strong general software engineering experience but lacks the core requirements for this role: native-level Japanese proficiency is absent (only English, Romanian, basic German listed), and there is no demonstrated experience with embedded firmware, LAN-switch products, security protocols like MACsec or 802.1X, or Linux kernel source modification. C/C++ experience is limited to a brief stint at National Instruments over a decade ago, with recent work focused on web/TypeScript stacks.
strengths: Long track record of professional software development across multiple domains
Some prior C/C++ experience at National Instruments on developer tooling
Strong testing discipline and TDD practice
concerns: No Japanese language proficiency — hard requirement not met
No embedded systems, networking switch, or Linux kernel modification experience
No security technology experience (MACsec, 802.1X, Captive Portal, encryption)
